mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.corp_id, c.corp_cd, u.username, u.password FROM users u JOIN hub_corp c ON c.id = u.corp_id WHERE u.id = #{id}
SELECT u.id, u.corp_id, c.corp_cd, u.username, u.password FROM users u JOIN hub_corp c ON c.id = u.corp_id WHERE u.username = #{username}
SELECT mall_key FROM user_malls m JOIN users u ON u.corp_id = m.corp_id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY mall_key ORDER BY mall_key
